prompt_text:
### Demographics: 52-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 1 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older brother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 5 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~2.5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 81.8 kg; Height 178.4 cm; BMI 25.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 133/74 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.1%; 9 months ago 7.2%; 6 months ago 7.3%; 3 months ago 7.0%; current 7.3%), FPG (12 months ago 143mg/dL; 9 months ago 144mg/dL; 6 months ago 185mg/dL; 3 months ago 183mg/dL; current 159mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 82.1kg; 9 months ago 80.2kg; 6 months ago 79.7kg; 3 months ago 78.9kg; current 81.8kg), Height (12 months ago 178.4cm; 9 months ago 178.4cm; 6 months ago 178.4cm; 3 months ago 178.4cm; current 178.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 25.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 132mmHg; 9 months ago 131mmHg; 6 months ago 131mmHg; 3 months ago 134mmHg; current 133mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 72mmHg; 9 months ago 72mmHg; 6 months ago 72mmHg; 3 months ago 71mmHg; current 74mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 18U/L; 9 months ago 19U/L; 6 months ago 18U/L; 3 months ago 13U/L; current 15U/L), AST (12 months ago 21U/L; 9 months ago 26U/L; 6 months ago 21U/L; 3 months ago 19U/L; current 25U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 23mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 25mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 20mL/min/1.73m²; current 21mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 1077mg/g; 9 months ago 743mg/g; 6 months ago 772mg/g; 3 months ago 705mg/g; current 846mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 85mg/dL; 9 months ago 79mg/dL; 6 months ago 79mg/dL; 3 months ago 78mg/dL; current 82mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 62mg/dL; 9 months ago 62mg/dL; 6 months ago 61mg/dL; 3 months ago 62mg/dL; current 60mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 130mg/dL; 9 months ago 114mg/dL; 6 months ago 112mg/dL; 3 months ago 126mg/dL; current 119mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.8g/dL; current 10.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
